title: Department Manager Vacancy at More Retail - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at More Retail - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with More Retail! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Ludhiana team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About More Retail:
More Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with More Retail!
